titleStmt.title: SII 17.311: original edition by K. G. Krishnan
No. 311. (A.R. No. 282 of 1904.) KĀḶAHASTI, KALAHASTI TALUK, CHITTOOR DISTRICT.

summary.p: On the south wall of the central shrine of in the Kāḷahastīśvara temple.

This inscription records the gift of 96 sheep by Nārāyaṇaṉ alias Śīyārūr Madurāntaka-mūvēndavēḷāṉ of Poṟkalakkuḍi in Marukal-nāḍu in the Kshattiriyaśikhāmaṇi-vaḷanāḍu, of Śōḻamaṇḍalam for burning a perpetual lamp to the deity Tirukkāḷatti-uḍaiyār in Āṟṟūr-nāḍu, a division of Adhirājēndra-maṇḍalam.

revisionDesc.change: Further conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)
Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī . virame tuṇaiyākat tiyākame yaṇi
yāka ceṅkolocci karuṅkalikaṭintu kūṭal caṅkat
tākavamallaṉai Añcuvittu vikkalaṉaiyum
ciṅkaṇaṉaiyum Uṭaipuṟaṅkaṇṭu maṟṟavan teviya
roṭu vastuvāhanaṅkoṇṭu vijaiyapiṣekam paṇṇi vira
ciṅkācanattu viṟṟiruntaruḷina korājakecaripanmarāna Uṭai
yār śrīvīrarājen=ti(ntra)tevaṟku yāṇṭu 3 Āvatu
Atirājen=ti(ntra)maṇṭalattu Āṟṟūr nāṭṭu tirukkāḷatti Uṭai
yāṟku coḻamaṇṭalattu kṣattiriyacikāmaṇi vaḷanāṭṭu
marukal nāṭṭu poṟkalakkuṭip poṟkalakkuṭaiyān nārāyaṇan ciyārur
maturān=taka muven=taveḷān vaiytta tiri(ru)nun=tāviḷakkonṟukku vaiytta
cāvāmuvāpperāṭu [9 10 6] Ivvāṭu 9 10 6 kaikkoṇṭu can=tirātittavaṟ celu
ttuvatānen Ittevar civappirāmaṇan cūṟṟik[ka ]ka
ṇṭanen Itu panmāheśvara rakṣai .
Digital edition of SII 17.311 by converted to DHARMA conventions by Emmanuel Francis.
